title: Tulella ja miekalla: Kuvaus menneiltä ajoilta. 2
summaries: "Tulella ja miekalla: Kuvaus menneiltä ajoilta. 2" by Henryk Sienkiewicz is a historical novel published in 1886. Set during the Deluge period of the Northern Wars, it follows the turbulent story of Polish-Lithuanian nobleman Andrzej Kmicic, whose impetuous nature and dangerous companions threaten his love for Aleksandra Billevich. As Swedish forces invade and political allegiances fracture, Kmicic must navigate treachery, violence, and impossible choices that test his loyalty to both his country and his heart. subjects: Poland -- History -- John II Casimir, 1648-1668 -- Fiction
